{{Infobox artifact
| name = Ancient Bow of the Soulseeker
| introduced = cradle-10-reaper
}}

''See also: [[Ancient Bow of the Soulseeker Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The Ancient [[Bow]] of the Soulseeker, also known as [[Eclipse]] and the Sacred [[Bow]] of the Soulseeker, is a powerful weapon capable of instantly killing a [[Monarch]]. It is characterized by its amethyst beams and the ability to fire massive volleys of [[Forged]] arrows, such as a barrage of a thousand amethyst projectiles. The weapon is described as being made from the material of a [[Dreadgod]], specifically utilizing its [[binding]] to create arrows. While it is an incredibly potent tool, the weapon possesses a significant spiritual pressure that can be difficult for a user to manage within their [[soulspace]]. It is considered a unique item composed of irreplaceable parts, and it was intended to be a weapon for [[Mercy]] to master as she grows in power. The bow is distinct from the [[Silent King]] [[Bow]], which is a separate [[Dreadgod weapon]] crafted from the body of the [[Silent King]].}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eclipse]] is the [[Ancient Bow of the Soulseeker]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19">''Reaper'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Silent King]] [[Bow]] is a unique, white-striped [[Dreadgod weapon]] constructed from irreplaceable components. This heavy metaphysical tool, which possesses the ability to copy arrows and snarls within [[dream aura]], serves as one of [[Lindon]]'s weapons despite being an extra burden for him to hold. Although the oracle codex depicted [[Northstrider]] hiding the bow, [[Lindon]] eventually withdrew the item and considered its use. Because it is the most powerful object [[Lindon]] can feasibly transfer as a prize, he ultimately chose to leave the weapon with [[Mercy]], who had previously controlled it. The bow's immense authority was even evident in the cracks found within [[Mercy]]'s madra channels.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Silent King]] [[Bow]] is feared by [[Reigan Shen]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6">''Waybound'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Silent King]] [[Bow]] is one of [[Lindon]]'s weapons.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9">''Waybound'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Holding the [[Silent King]] [[Bow]] is an extra burden for [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Silent King]] [[Bow]] can copy arrows.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10">''Waybound'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Silent King]] [[Bow]] is [[Lindon]]'s most powerful object that he can feasibly transfer as a prize.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c11">''Waybound'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The oracle codex showed [[Northstrider]] tucking away the [[Silent King]] [[Bow]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] considers using the [[Silent King]] [[Bow]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c15">''Waybound'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Silent King]] [[Bow]] is a heavy metaphysical weapon.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c17">''Waybound'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Silent King]] [[Bow]] is a weapon that snarls in [[dream aura]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18">''Waybound'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] withdrew the [[Silent King]] [[Bow]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19">''Waybound'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Silent King]] [[Bow]] is a [[Dreadgod weapon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20">''Waybound'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Silent King]] [[Bow]] is a white-striped bow.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Silent King]] [[Bow]] is a unique item made of irreplaceable components.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21">''Waybound'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The cracks in [[Mercy]]'s madra channels carried authority from the [[Silent King]] [[Bow]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] had previously controlled the [[Silent King]] [[Bow]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c25">''Waybound'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] left the [[Silent King]] [[Bow]] with [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c28">''Waybound'', chapter 28</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
